title: Top One Trader special
description: Top One Trader, based in the United States and established in September 2023, is a CFD firm offering three program types: Instant, 1 Step, and 2 Steps. The firm supports MT5, cTrader, Match Trader, and TradeLocker platforms. Its public reputation shows a review score of 4.5 out of 5 based on 125 reviews. Verified by our [Intelligence Hub](/) for prop trading excellence.

firm_rules.copy_trading: Allowed: Manual copy trading only between your own challenge accounts (1-step, 2-step Pro and 2-step Plus). Prohibited on funded or instant funded accounts.
firm_rules.expert_advisor: EAs are allowed only on 1-step-FLASH, 2-step-Pro and 2-step-Plus challenge accounts, not on funded accounts. Must customize settings.
firm_rules.inactivity_rule: 30-day inactivity rule. Must place at least one trade every 30 days.
firm_rules.news_trading: Evaluation: Allowed. Funded/Instant: Prohibited 5 mins before/after high impact news (Violation = profit deduction). Instant Prime allows news trading with add-on.
firm_rules.weekend_holding: Temporary restriction on metals leverage (1:3) and weekend holding. Weekends restricted unless add-on purchased.

seo_content:
Top One Trader Technical Infrastructure

Top One Trader, based in the United States and established in September 2023, is a CFD proprietary trading firm offering Flash Challenge (1-step), Pro Challenge (2-step), Instant Funding (instant), and Instant Prime (instant) programs. Account sizes range from $5,000 to $200,000. Four platforms are supported: MT5, cTrader, Match Trader, and TradeLocker. A coupon code (VDAY) delivers a special discount on applicable programs. MT5 was returned to the platform lineup in August 2025. The firm holds a review score of 4.5 out of 5 based on 125 reviews.

The Flash 1-step program covers three sizes: $5,000 at $19.20 (original $64.00), $25,000 at $86.00 (original $215.00), and $100,000 at $287.50 (original $575.00). The Pro 2-step is available at $5,000 for $59.50 (original $119.00) and $50,000 for $294.60 (original $491.00). The Instant Funding program spans three sizes: $5,000 at $40.50 (original $135.00), $100,000 at $571.00 (original $1,142.00), and $200,000 at $1,268.50 (original $2,537.00). The Instant Prime program is listed at $50,000 for $164.00 (original $410.00) and $100,000 for $399.00 (original $798.00). Payments are accepted via Apple Pay, Credit Card, Crypto, and Google Pay.

Four platforms are supported: MT5, cTrader, Match Trader, and TradeLocker. Tradable instruments include FX, Metals, Indices, Energy, Crypto, and Other Commodities. Leverage on 2-step and Instant accounts is 1:50 for FX; on 1-step accounts FX leverage is 1:10. Metals leverage is 1:3 across all program types. Indices leverage is 1:10 across all types. Crypto is 1:1 on Instant and 1:2 on 1-step and 2-step. News trading during evaluations is permitted; on funded and Instant accounts it is prohibited within 5 minutes before and after high-impact news events, with profit deduction as the penalty. Instant Prime allows news trading with an add-on. Weekend holding is restricted unless a weekend add-on is purchased; metals leverage is temporarily capped at 1:3 on weekends.

The profit split for Flash and Pro is 80%, upgradeable to 90% with an add-on. Instant Funding starts at 60% and scales up to 90%. Instant Prime starts at 80% and scales to 100%. Payouts for Flash, Pro, and Prime are bi-weekly; Instant Funding pays monthly. The minimum payout is 2% of the initial account balance (Instant Prime). A maximum withdrawal cap of $25,000 in net profits per 30 days applies across all programs. A 30% consistency rule applies on funded accounts. Payout method is Riseworks only.

Top One Trader prohibits HFT, tick scalping, latency trading, arbitrage, group trading, hedging across accounts, grid trading, martingale, third-party challenge passing services, gambling, over-leveraging, YOLO trading, and account rolling or churning. All profitable trades must have a minimum hold time of 5 minutes. An active stop-loss must be in place when entering every trade. The 2-step Plus funded account carries a daily profit cap of 5% of the funded starting balance. EAs are allowed only on Flash 1-step, Pro 2-step, and Plus 2-step challenge accounts — not on funded accounts — and EA settings must be customized. Copy trading is allowed only via manual execution between the trader's own challenge accounts; it is prohibited on funded and instant funded accounts.
